special.name: Navaratna Kurma (Kashmiri Style) + Capsicum Subzi (Maharashtrian Style)
special.description: A royal nine-treasure kurma simmered in a saffron-cashew gravy, paired with a rustic groundnut-capsicum subzi and soft, hand-rolled parathas.
special.posterAlt: Simply Signature weekly poster: Navaratna Kurma (Kashmiri style) with Capsicum Subzi (Maharashtrian style) and parathas — Sunday lunch, order on WhatsApp

portionsNote: Prepared in limited quantities — only 10 portions this week — to maintain freshness and quality.

items.name: Main Set
items.detail: Navaratna Kurma ~500 ml + Capsicum Subzi 250 ml + 2 Parathas

mygateMessage:
🌿 Simply Signature — Sunday Lunch, 19 July 2026 🌿

This week: Navaratna Kurma (Kashmiri Style) + Capsicum Subzi (Maharashtrian Style) with soft parathas.

Main Set ₹300 · Add-ons available.
100% vegetarian, homemade in small batches at JVT-343.

Order before Saturday 9:00 PM on WhatsApp: +91 97658 44659 (Gayathri)
Or order online: https://simplysignature.in/order

Thank you for supporting community home kitchens! 💛
